{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Iron Legion territory
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The safest way to flee the [[Iron Legion]] is to go through their territory.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
